description: Rebuild Cloud Functions to fix emulator crash, fix remaining layout constraint issues, scan all screens for overflow risks, and run integration tests to verify nothing is broken.

userStories.title: Rebuild Cloud Functions — Fix onUserCreate Emulator Crash
userStories.description: Run `cd functions && npm run build` (tsc) to recompile TypeScript Cloud Functions. Fix any TypeScript compilation errors so onUserCreate and all other functions work correctly in the Firebase emulator. The compiled output goes to functions/lib/.
acceptanceCriteria: Running `cd functions && npm run build` completes with zero errors
functions/lib/index.js exists and is up-to-date with functions/src/index.ts
onUserCreate function is properly exported and callable in the emulator (no runtime crash on user creation)
All other exported functions (if any) compile without errors
No TypeScript strict-mode warnings remain

userStories.title: Fix Size(double.infinity, 52) in poster_home_screen.dart
userStories.description: Replace `Size(double.infinity, 52)` at line 77 of poster_home_screen.dart with a properly constrained size. Use `Size.fromHeight(52)` or `Size(double.maxFinite, 52)` depending on the widget context. The current pattern can cause layout issues in certain parent constraints.
acceptanceCriteria: poster_home_screen.dart no longer contains `Size(double.infinity, 52)`
The 'Post a Task' button still renders full-width within its parent padding and is 52 logical pixels tall
flutter analyze shows 0 errors on poster_home_screen.dart
No visual regression — button appearance is unchanged

userStories.title: Scan All Screens for Layout Overflow Risks and Fix
userStories.description: Audit every screen in lib/features/*/presentation/screens/ for layout overflow risks: unbounded Row children without Expanded/Flexible, Size(double.infinity, ...) patterns, unconstrained Column inside horizontal scroll, Text without overflow handling in bounded containers. Fix any issues found.
acceptanceCriteria: No remaining `Size(double.infinity, ...)` patterns anywhere in lib/ (use Size.fromHeight or constrained alternatives)
All Row widgets with text children use Expanded or Flexible to prevent horizontal overflow
All Text widgets in constrained containers have overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis or maxLines set
No unbounded Container or SizedBox with double.infinity width inside horizontally unbounded parents
flutter analyze shows 0 errors across all modified files
Document all changes made in the commit message

userStories.title: Run Integration Tests — Verify Nothing Is Broken
userStories.description: Run the 5 core integration tests (auth_flow_test, post_task_test, bidding_flow_test, chat_flow_test, edit_profile_test) plus flutter analyze and flutter test. Fix any test failures caused by changes in US-065 through US-067 or pre-existing regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: flutter analyze completes with 0 errors
flutter test completes with all unit tests passing
integration_test/auth_flow_test.dart passes or is verified runnable
integration_test/post_task_test.dart passes or is verified runnable
integration_test/bidding_flow_test.dart passes or is verified runnable
integration_test/chat_flow_test.dart passes or is verified runnable
integration_test/edit_profile_test.dart passes or is verified runnable
No regressions introduced by Sprint 10 changes
